Don't leave strips your teeth longer than advised could experience tooth sensitivity sore gums.

Combined with professional-grade take-home treatments, patients average improvement shades.
comparison, over-the-counter whitening requires daily 30-minute applications more than weeks achieve six-shade improvement.
